newfold-labs/wp-plugin-bluehost.name: newfold-labs/wp-plugin-bluehost
newfold-labs/wp-plugin-bluehost.description: WordPress plugin that integrates your WordPress site with the Bluehost control panel, including performance, security, and update features.

newfold-labs/wp-plugin-bluehost.name: newfold-labs/wp-plugin-bluehost

ensure-strauss: sh -c 'test -f ./bin/strauss.phar || (mkdir -p bin && curl -o bin/strauss.phar -L https://github.com/BrianHenryIE/strauss/releases/latest/download/strauss.phar && chmod +x bin/strauss.phar)'
test-coverage: echo "open tests/_output/html/index.html" to view the report
